summary: REQ-24 appears implemented by updating the existing logo asset at the exact path/filename. However, the diff also includes extensive frontend code/style changes that were not requested and may violate the stated non-goals (no new flows/pages, no backend/model changes, keep existing navigation/content).

hallucinated_features.description: Broad UI/theme refactor across multiple frontend components (layout, header, feed, form, modal) including gradients, styling changes, and removal of decorative accents.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest only asked to replace the logo artwork file while keeping filename/dimensions; no UI refactor was requested.
evidence: frontend-file-summaries.txt (frontend/src/components/AppLayout.tsx, AppHeader.tsx, PickupLineFeed.tsx, SubmitPickupLineForm.tsx, PickupLineDetail.tsx, frontend/src/index.css, frontend/tailwind.config.js)

hallucinated_features.description: Changes to app logic/state management and prop corrections in App component.
hallucinated_features.reason: Non-goals include not changing logic; request was asset-only.

hallucinated_features.description: Changes to React Query hooks for fetching/submitting/reporting pickup lines.
